summary: Iteration 43 - Verified all 3 main fixes from iteration 42. All features working correctly: 1) addpage tool no longer opens Chart/Image panels (actionTools fix working), 2) Page 1 text persists after adding page 2 (element saving fix working), 3) Cross-page editing works (pendingEditRef fix working). Export modal properly displays all export options.

issues: Console shows CSS style property warnings about padding/paddingBottom conflicts - cosmetic issue, not blocking

features_tested.Type text on Page 1: PASS - Text element created and editable
features_tested.Add page using [data-testid='add-page-bt: PASS - Page added, no unwanted panels opened
features_tested.Page 1 text preserved after adding Page: PASS - Critical bug FIXED, text persists
features_tested.Add text to Page 2: PASS - Text element created on second page
features_tested.Cross-page editing (click Page 1 from Pa: PASS - Page indicator switches from 2/2 to 1/2

critical_code_review_comments: The actionTools array fix in Editor.js (line 544-549) correctly prevents addpage from setting activeTool state
The addPage function (line 442-452) now properly saves current page elements before adding new page
pendingEditRef in CanvasArea.js works correctly for cross-page editing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified all bug fixes from iteration 42. Key fixes confirmed working: 1) addpage tool only adds page (no Chart/Image panels), 2) Page text preserved across page additions, 3) Cross-page editing switches pages correctly. Export modal displays all format options. The 'PDF Aktar' button in right panel does direct PDF export, while the download icon in header opens the export modal with all options.

bugs_fixed.bug: addpage tool opened Chart panel and Image Upload modal
bugs_fixed.fix: Added actionTools array that skips setActiveTool for action-only tools

bugs_fixed.bug: Page 1 text was lost when adding Page 2
bugs_fixed.fix: addPage function now saves current page elements before pushing new page
pendingEditRef properly stores element ID from doc.pages before changePage
